Format Converters

Output Formats

FormatDescriptionPrimary Use CaseTools
ShareGPTMulti-turn conversationsSFT, Hermes, Unsloth, LLaMA-FactoryUniversal
DPOPreference pairs (chosen/rejected)DPO, KTO, ORPOTRL, Axolotl
GRPOTrajectories with rewardsGRPO, PPO, RLHFCustom
JSONLGeneric line-delimitedCustom pipelinesAny
AlpacaInstruction/Input/OutputAlpaca-style SFTLegacy
HFHugging Face DatasetsHF Trainer, PEFTHugging Face Ecosystem

Format Comparison

FeatureShareGPTDPOGRPOJSONLAlpacaHF
Multi-turnYesNoYesYesNoYes
PreferencesNoYesNoNoNoYes
RewardsNoNoYesNoNoYes
System promptYesNoNoYesNoYes
MetadataYesYesYesYesYesYes
HermesYesYesYesYesNoYes
UnslothYesYesNoYesYesYes
AxolotlYesYesYesYesYesYes

Choosing a Format

Need SFT? → ShareGPT (default) Need DPO/KTO/ORPO? → DPO Need RLHF/PPO/GRPO? → GRPO Custom pipeline? → JSONL Legacy Alpaca? → Alpaca HF Trainer/PEFT? → HF
